name: Sourabh Jha
certifications: Microsoft Certified: Security Operations Analyst Associate

experience.title: Associate Software Engineer
bullets: Delivered backend enhancements and production fixes for enterprise-scale web content management platforms using Java, REST APIs, and Git workflows.
Investigated and resolved 50+ production issues across development, staging, and production environments through root-cause analysis and permanent corrective actions.
Improved backend service performance by 20% through API optimization, code refactoring, and data-flow improvements.
Enhanced CI/CD workflows using Docker and GitHub Actions, reducing deployment turnaround time by 15–20%.
Maintained 99.9% system availability through deployment support, monitoring, issue triaging, and incident resolution.
Reduced MTTR by 30% through observability improvements, proactive log analysis, and monitoring enhancements.
Collaborated with QA teams, business stakeholders, and release managers to support critical enterprise releases across multiple environments.
Leveraged AI-assisted development workflows for debugging, documentation, architecture exploration, and productivity improvements.

projects.name: Ash OS
projects.stack: Linux, Shell, Lua, GitHub Actions, Docker
bullets: Developed a lightweight Linux distribution optimized for older hardware with enhanced audio and performance.
Achieved 66.7% lower storage usage and 24% lower RAM consumption compared to Fedora.
Automated ISO build and release flow using Docker and GitHub Actions.

projects.name: Website Nativefier
projects.stack: Go, Electron, Tailwind, Docker, Kubernetes, Terraform, Azure
bullets: Built a Go-based tool that converts websites into native-like Electron apps.
Deployed the tool using Docker, AKS, and Terraform with automated CI/CD via GitHub Actions.

projects.name: Git Automation CLI
bullets: Built a Git repository monitoring tool capable of tracking branch creation, deletion, commits, merges, and repository activity in real time.
Implemented filesystem event monitoring using fsnotify and Git metadata inspection through native Git commands.
Developed persistent logging, colorized terminal output, and multi-repository monitoring capabilities.
Designed for developer productivity, repository auditing, and engineering workflow automation.

education.degree: Bachelor of Technology in Computer Science and Engineering
